name: paperer-skill-plugin
description: Cross-platform Paperer skill bundle for readable paper PDFs

interface.shortDescription: Generate paper packages from readable research PDFs
interface.longDescription: Paperer turns a readable research PDF into a structured paper package with summary, extraction report, manifest, and visual assets.
defaultPrompt: Use Paperer to generate a paper package for this readable paper PDF.
Use Paperer to summarize this paper and extract figures, tables, and formulas.
Use Paperer on this PDF and return the output directory, summary, and report paths.
